74761.subject: рҹ“° AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest вҖ” June 18
74761.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Oleh Bezuhlyi


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-18-oleh-bezuhlyi-n9ajf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BbXWZIsjsR8CSpIOr7cGRsw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2Ww0fy61Wk8Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqjphwcm~l2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqjphwcm-l2
  
рҹ§  AI's Crypto News Brief: The mood is defensive вҖ” regulators are tightening the screws from Illinois to Singapore while Washington politics and Gulf capital pull crypto in opposite directions. Adoption headlines now compete head-on with enforcement. рҹҮЁрҹҮі China Signs 26 Institutions to Cross-Border Digital Yuan Network China has onboarded 26 financial institutions onto a cross-border network for its digital yuan, widening the e-CNY's reach in international settlement. Backers frame it as an accelerant for de-dollarization that could reshape global trade and payment rails. Read full story вҶ’ рҹҸӣпёҸ Illinois Enacts Crypto Broker Tax, Drawing Industry Backlash Governor JB Pritzker signed a budget package introducing a new transaction tax on digital-asset brokers, prompting sharp criticism from crypto industry groups. Opponents warn the levy could push trading activity and businesses out of the state. More details вҶ’ вҡ–пёҸ Senators File Bipartisan Resolution Opposing an SBF Pardon Senators Ruben Gallego and Cynthia Lummis introduced a bipartisan resolution urging that FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried receive no clemency under any circumstances. The measure puts the chamber on record against pardoning one of crypto's most notorious convicted fraudsters. Read more вҶ’ рҹҡЁ Singapore's MAS Adds Bybit to Investor Alert List The Monetary Authority of Singapore placed exchange Bybit on its Investor Alert List, publicly flagging it as not licensed to serve the local market. The designation adds regulatory friction for one of the world's larger derivatives venues and could weigh on regional user trust. See details вҶ’ рҹӨқ Inveniam to Acquire Mantra Following OM Token Collapse Inveniam announced plans to acquire Mantra, the blockchain project still recovering from last year's dramatic OM token crash and months of market pressure. The deal marks a notable consolidation in the battered real-world-asset sector. Read full story вҶ’ рҹҸ—пёҸ Gulf Dynasty Heir Moves $6 Trillion Trade Market Onto Blockchain Abdulla Kanoo, heir to a 135-year-old Gulf business dynasty, says his ARP Digital firm is building blockchain settlement infrastructure for trade between emerging economies вҖ” a flow that could reach $32 trillion by 2030. It signals a serious institutional bet on tokenized trade finance. More details вҶ’ рҹ—іпёҸ Crypto-Backed Barry Moore Wins Alabama GOP Senate Primary Representati

74752.subject: The Onchain Equity Bull
74752.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Gm, and happy Thursday!

Kevin WarshвҖҷs first FOMC set the town hawkish, guiding for a firm stance on price stability and a higher-for-longer policy regime, with risk assets selling off modestly on the back of this.

Meanwhile, onchain equities are in a bull, with spot volumes reaching new all-time highs. Whether itвҖҷs trading, leverage, or borrowing, this sector shows growing traction. Enjoy!

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Wednesday welcomed Kevin WarshвҖҷs first FOMC as Chairman of the Federal Reserve, where all 12 on the committee voted to keep rates steady at 3.5% to 3.75%. Perhaps the more important takeaway from this FOMC was not the level of the FFR, but rather, the language used by the new Chairman to deliver it. Rather than letting liquid markets respond to the Fed, Warsh guided towards a committee that will endeavor to let the Fed respond to liquid markets instead.

вҖңFinancial market prices are probably the most important source of information to guide central bankers,вҖқ Warsh said, adding, вҖңBut when all the financial markets are doing is reflecting back what we've said, then we're taking the most important source of information, and we're being blind to it.вҖқВ 

Beyond this, the dot plot points to a вҖңhigher-for-longerвҖқ regime, with an increasing share of the committee projecting a hike this year. The plot pointed to easing and cuts just a few months ago.В 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/86217312-d5d0-4375-ad94-eede903144a2/image.png?t=1781787037)
Caption: Source: [Federal Reserve](https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/files/fomcprojtabl20260617.pdf)

The tone was set firmly that price stability remains the goal of the Fed, and the policy lever will be used accordingly to achieve this. Markets sold off modestly on the back of this, with crypto leading to the downside. While the Nasdaq and the S&P 500 traded down 0.3% and 0.8%, respectively, BTC was down 1.9%, with the majority of crypto sectors moving even lower on the day.В 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/1cda3432-5053-4b85-bdfe-6e824d2f52f1/image.png?t=1781787037)
Caption: 

Crypto markets still show signs of stress, and STRC traded down to fresh lows of $89, now paying an effective dividend yield of 12.9%. For MSTR, the credit spread continues to widen. While the instrument offered an attractive Sharpe of 4 and volatility

74751.subject: Re: SvadobnГЎ vГҪzdoba
74751.body:
ZdravГӯm Oleg,

UrДҚite ГЎno, mali by ste ДҚas doobedu?

ДҺakujem

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker

DЕҲa ЕЎt 18.вҖҜ6.вҖҜ2026 o 15:33 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
napГӯsala(a):

> Dobry ,
>
> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a ked Ano,
> ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>
> РІСӮ, 19 СӮСҖР°РІ. 2026вҖҜСҖ. Рҫ 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk> РҝРёСҲРө:
>
>> ZdravГӯme nevestuрҹ’ҚрҹӨҚ,
>>
>> ДҺakujeme veДҫmi pekne za vaЕЎu sprГЎvu.. TermГӯn svadby mГЎme eЕЎte voДҫnГҪ a
>> veДҫmi radi budeme sГәДҚasЕҘou vaЕЎej svadby.рҹӨҚ
>>
>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretГЎvame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
>> (kГәsok od KoЕЎГӯc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladaЕҘ svadobnГә vГҪzdobu a na zГЎklade
>> toho vytvoriЕҘ cenovГә ponuku na mieru pre vГЎs ak by ste mali zГЎujem prosГӯm
>> navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas kedy by vГЎm to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa ДҚasovo radi
>> prispГҙsobГӯme vГЎЕЎmu ДҚasu. PoprГӯpade, ak sme mimo KoЕЎГӯc ДҚi PreЕЎova, radi si s
>> Vami dohodneme videohovor. ProsГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas, ktorГҪ by VГЎm
>> vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez vГӯkend aj vo veДҚernГҪch hodinГЎch. рҹҷӮ
>> NajbliЕҫsie voДҫne termГӯny mГЎme eЕЎte aj tento tГҪЕҫdeЕҲ. Forme stretnutia sa
>> radi prispГҙsobГӯme VГЎm, ДҚo je pre VГЎs praktickejЕЎie вҳәпёҸ
>>
>> Budeme sa teЕЎiЕҘ na prГӯpadnГә spoluprГЎcu s Vami.
>>
>> S pozdravom
>>
>> Lenka Gattiker,
>> VaЕЎa osobnГЎ posh asistentka
>>
>>
